title: mldsa_round_trip feature-gated + self-oracle causes user confusion on failures
description: The mldsa_round_trip test is both feature-gated (cfg(feature=mldsa)) and a self-oracle (sign+verify via same HSM). Users who encounter interoperability bugs against a FIPS 204 reference implementation will find this test passes even when there is a real conformance defect. When they file bugs, maintainers will need to explain why the passing test is not evidence of correctness. Adding an independent oracle (e.g. ml-dsa pure-Rust crate) would eliminate this class of confusion.
